subject: Gaming
title: Pay-to-Win: When Money Beats Skill
description: A short lesson to help you apply Pay-to-Win: When Money Beats Skill.

hook.text: Spend $100 and beat players who practiced for months. Pay-to-win destroys competitive fairness.

buildup.text: Some games sell powerful items, characters, or boosts that give paying players a direct advantage.

discovery.text: Star Wars Battlefront II launched with extreme pay-to-win. It took 40 hours or $80 to unlock Darth Vader.

twist.text: EA's Reddit response defending the system became the most downvoted comment in Reddit history.

climax.text: The backlash forced EA to overhaul the system. Player outrage proved that communities have power.

punchline.text: Most downvoted comment in history. Players fought back and won.

quiz.question: What happened when EA defended Battlefront II's monetization on Reddit?
options: It became the most downvoted comment in Reddit history
